faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, Zero YTubeMate is completely free to use. There are no premium tiers, subscriptions, or hidden fees. We believe everyone deserves access to simple, well-made tools.
faq.a2: We support a wide range of resolutions including 360p, 480p, 720p (HD), 1080p (Full HD), 1440p (2K), and 2160p (4K). The available resolutions depend on the original video quality.
faq.a3: Yes! Zero YTubeMate supports 4K Ultra HD (2160p) downloads. If the original video was uploaded in 4K, you can download it in full 4K quality.
faq.q4: Is it safe to use? Is my data private?
faq.a4: Absolutely. We don't require registration, don't store personal data, and don't track your downloads. Your privacy is our priority.
faq.q5: Do I need to create an account or install software?
faq.a5: No. Zero YTubeMate works entirely in your browser. No account creation, no software installation — just paste a URL and download.
faq.a6: Yes! Simply paste the YouTube Shorts URL and download it just like any other video. Shorts are automatically detected.
faq.q7: Can I convert YouTube videos to MP3?
faq.a7: Yes, we support MP3 extraction with multiple bitrate options: 128kbps, 192kbps, and 320kbps.
faq.q8: What devices and browsers are supported?
faq.a8: Zero YTubeMate works on all modern browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge) across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.
faq.q9: How long does a download take?
faq.a9: Most downloads start within seconds. The total time depends on the video length, chosen quality, and your internet connection speed.
faq.q10: Why can't I download a specific video?
faq.a10: Some videos may be restricted by the uploader or by YouTube's terms. If a video is private, age-restricted, or region-locked, it may not be available for download.

about.title: About Zero YTubeMate
about.content:
Hi — I'm Noam, a 31-year-old indie developer, and I built this tool because I believe the best things on the internet should be free.

I got tired of YouTube downloader sites that are bloated with ads, riddled with dark patterns, and treat their users like products. So I built the one I wished existed: fast, clean, no tricks, no subscriptions — just paste a link and download your video. That's it.

Zero YTubeMate is and always will be completely free. No premium tiers. No "sign up to unlock 4K." No bait-and-switch. I fund this out of my own pocket because I think everyone deserves access to simple, well-made tools — whether you're a student saving a lecture, a creator archiving your work, or just someone who wants to watch a video on a plane.

I'm one person building this for millions. If something breaks, if you have an idea, or if you just want to say thanks — drop me a line at boss@zero-ytubemate.cc. I read every message.

— Noam

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: Have a question, suggestion, or issue? Reach out — I read every email.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy matters to us. This policy explains what data we collect and how we use it.
privacy.whatWeCollectContent: We use Google Analytics and Microsoft Clarity to understand how visitors use our site. These tools may collect anonymous usage data such as pages visited, time spent, and general device information. We do not collect personal information, require registration, or store any data about your downloads.
privacy.cookiesContent: We use minimal cookies for essential functionality only: remembering your language preference and dark mode setting. We do not use advertising cookies.
privacy.thirdPartyContent: We use Google Analytics (GA4) for traffic analytics and Microsoft Clarity for behavioral analytics including session recordings and heatmaps. These services have their own privacy policies.
privacy.dataRetentionContent: We do not store any personal data. Analytics data is retained by the respective third-party services according to their own policies.
privacy.contactContent: If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact us at boss@zero-ytubemate.cc.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using Zero YTubeMate, you agree to the following terms.
terms.usageContent: This service is provided for personal use only. You are responsible for ensuring that your use of this tool complies with applicable laws in your jurisdiction and YouTube's Terms of Service.
terms.disclaimerContent: Zero YTubeMate is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. We do not guarantee the availability, accuracy, or reliability of the service. We are not responsible for the content of downloaded videos.
terms.ipContent: Downloaded content remains the intellectual property of its original creators. Users are responsible for respecting copyright and intellectual property rights.
terms.liabilityContent: Zero YTubeMate shall not be liable for any damages arising from the use of this service.
terms.changesContent: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of any changes.

howToUse.title: How to Use Zero YTubeMate
howToUse.intro: Follow these simple steps to download any YouTube video in your preferred format.
howToUse.desktopStep1: Open YouTube and navigate to the video you want to download.
howToUse.desktopStep2: Copy the video URL from the address bar.
howToUse.desktopStep3: Paste the URL into the input field on our homepage.
howToUse.desktopStep4: Click "Download" and choose your preferred format and quality.
howToUse.desktopStep5: Click the download button next to your chosen option. The file will save to your device.
howToUse.mobileStep1: Open the YouTube app and find the video you want to download.
howToUse.mobileStep2: Tap "Share" and then "Copy Link" to copy the video URL.
howToUse.mobileStep3: Open your browser and go to zero-ytubemate.cc.
howToUse.mobileStep5: Choose your format and quality, then tap the download button.
howToUse.mp3Step1: Paste the YouTube video URL and submit it.
howToUse.mp3Step2: On the download page, switch to the "Audio" tab.
howToUse.mp3Step4: Click download to save the MP3 file.
howToUse.shortsStep1: Open a YouTube Short and copy its URL.
howToUse.shortsStep2: Paste the Shorts URL into our downloader — it's automatically detected.
howToUse.shortsStep3: Choose your quality and download the Short as an MP4 file.

landingMp3.title: YouTube to MP3 Converter — Free & High Quality
landingMp3.subtitle: Extract audio from any YouTube video and download it as an MP3 file. Choose between 128kbps, 192kbps, or 320kbps.
landingMp3.content: Zero YTubeMate makes it easy to convert any YouTube video to MP3 audio. Whether you want to save a podcast, music track, or lecture audio, our tool delivers high-quality MP3 files in seconds. Simply paste the YouTube URL, switch to the Audio tab, and choose your preferred bitrate. No software to install, no account to create — it's completely free.

landingMp4.title: YouTube to MP4 Downloader — Free HD & 4K
landingMp4.subtitle: Download any YouTube video as an MP4 file in resolutions up to 4K Ultra HD.
landingMp4.content: Looking to save a YouTube video as an MP4 file? Zero YTubeMate supports downloads in 360p, 480p, 720p HD, 1080p Full HD, 1440p 2K, and 2160p 4K. Our tool is fast, free, and works directly in your browser. Paste a YouTube URL, choose your quality, and download — it's that simple.

landingShorts.title: YouTube Shorts Downloader — Save Shorts for Free
landingShorts.subtitle: Download any YouTube Shorts video in high quality MP4 format. No watermark added.
landingShorts.content: Want to save your favorite YouTube Shorts? Zero YTubeMate automatically detects Shorts URLs and lets you download them in full quality as MP4 files. No watermarks, no tricks — just paste the Shorts link, click download, and save it to your device.

landing4k.title: YouTube 4K Downloader — Free Ultra HD Video
landing4k.subtitle: Download YouTube videos in 4K Ultra HD (2160p) quality. The highest quality available.
landing4k.content: Most free YouTube downloaders cap at 1080p. Zero YTubeMate goes further — download videos in full 4K Ultra HD resolution when available. Perfect for saving nature documentaries, tech reviews, or any content where detail matters. Just paste the URL, select 4K, and download.
